headline: Michael Burry Buys the Dip in Four Tech Stocks He Sees as Bargains
summary: Michael Burry, who recently warned of an AI bubble, recently disclosed that he is buying the dip in some of the most beaten-down technology stocks he sees as bargains.

headline: Mark Zuckerberg Says Peter Thiel's 'Pithy Quote' Helped Him Navigate Directional Shifts In Facebook's Early Days: 'The Biggest Risk You Can Take…'
summary: Meta Platforms CEO Mark Zuckerberg's best advice from PayPal cofounder Peter Thiel is to take risks and avoid stagnation.

headline: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
summary: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.
